items.label: Post most recent episode
items.description: Fetches the latest episode from all configured RSS feeds and creates new posts.

feed1Url.label: Podcast 1 — RSS Feed URL
feed1Url.helpText: Paste the full RSS feed URL for your first podcast.

feed1Name.label: Podcast 1 — Name (optional)
feed1Name.helpText: Override the podcast name shown in post titles. Leave blank to use the RSS feed title.

feed2Url.label: Podcast 2 — RSS Feed URL
feed2Url.helpText: Optional. Add a second podcast RSS feed.

feed3Url.label: Podcast 3 — RSS Feed URL
feed3Url.helpText: Optional. Add a third podcast RSS feed.

feed4Url.label: Podcast 4 — RSS Feed URL
feed4Url.helpText: Optional. Add a fourth podcast RSS feed.

feed5Url.label: Podcast 5 — RSS Feed URL
feed5Url.helpText: Optional. Add a fifth podcast RSS feed.
